matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011101110 6
1 111110010 6
2 000000000 a
3 101011101 6
4 001100100 3
5 011100000 3
6 101011011 6
7 111100010 5

70 07 101010000 3

13 31 001000000 1

35 53 100001000 2
